title: Legends & Myths (Cobblemon)
description: A data pack that adds legendary and mythical Pokémon to the game. Explore new buildings and Pokemon, gain new experiences in your adventures.
body:
# L&M IS PAUSED FOR INDEFINITE PERIOD OF TIME  

# FAQ:

# **What does Legends & Myths do?**

Datapack for Cobblemon which adds legenadry and mythical pokemons to the game. Every legendary/mythical pokemon from datapack have unique structure where they spawn.

# For datapack and resourcepack to work 
**(ONLY IF USING DATAPACK FORMAT)**

Install the **resourcepack** and **datapack** files 

Put it datapack file into the "datapacks" folder of your world

Put resourcepack file inside of your resourcepacks

Turn on the resourcepack

# **How to change Deoxys' form?**

You have to go to the end in order to change it's forms (no items needed)

# How to change Silvally's type?

You have to give it a gem. Based on gem held the typing of your Silvally will change

# Which pokemons added?
- Deoxys (All 4 forms)
- Glastrier 
- Calyrex (No forms yet)
- Keldeo (Only one form)
- Regirock
- Registeel
- Regice
- Regieleki
- Regidrago
- Regigigas
- Kyogre (Donated model by: Karlo)
- Kyurem (No other forms yet)
- Genesect (No drives yet and can't be obtained in the survival)
- Latias
- Latios
- Meloetta (Only one form)
- Type: Null (From: Pokemans Pack [Cobblemon])
- Silvally (All types) (From: Pokemans Pack [Cobblemon])
- Magearna (Only default colour)

# We AREN'T Myths and Legends

Legends & Myths and Myths and Legends are two different modifications! 

# **Which format is better to use Mod/Datapack?**

Datapck is more stable version of this modification since it was focused for datapack format and thus has less visual bugs.

# **Links**
